top_signals.title: Consumers Look For Bling for Buck In Lab Grown Gemstones
top_signals.summary: Nathalie Morrison, Astrea London Founder joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the growing trend on lab grown diamonds, the intersection of sustainability, innovation, and the future of the diamond industry. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
